required_inputs: closeout note pattern for the family
success_predicate: the closeout docs all reflect post-merge state and the correct next branch-local path
forbidden_shortcuts: leaving the planning doc in pre-closeout state
claiming closeout while one of the required closeout docs is still stale
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact stale-doc blocker and wait

required_inputs: merged PR evidence and runtime/event artifacts
required_outputs: runtime event-stream artifact when required by the family pattern
success_predicate: the evidence tree matches the closeout docs and the family closeout pattern
forbidden_shortcuts: copy-forwarding stale baseline/current arc linkage without review
omitting required evidence-input JSONs while the closeout docs reference them
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact evidence gap and wait

required_outputs: confirmed baseline/current linkage for copied closeout JSONs
confirmed agreement between closeout docs and evidence-input refs
success_predicate: copied JSONs do not retain stale baseline/current arc linkage
forbidden_shortcuts: assuming copied metrics linkage is correct without inspection
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact linkage mismatch and wait

success_predicate: the docs-only closeout gate selected for the slice passes
forbidden_shortcuts: claiming closeout complete while the closeout gate is red
claiming broader Python validation than the docs-only closeout gate actually covers
steps.escalate_if_fail: emit exact gate failure and wait

required_outputs: closeout worker baton naming docs updated, evidence created, gate run, blockers, and readiness judgment
success_predicate: the orchestrator can decide on commit/push without interpretive recovery
forbidden_shortcuts: claiming closeout completion without the baton
steps.escalate_if_fail: stay on this step until the baton exists
